summaries.summary: Shipped 59 commits across OrderProtection/monolog and wolzey/agent-factory (TypeScript). Enhanced OP detection, redesigned confirmation UI, added theme management, and integrated deeper Claude features with session management fixes.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented comprehensive non-standard OP detection and redesigned confirmation cards with progress output and final reports
monolog (OrderProtection): Added theme rename logic with date stamping, 64-char limits, and auto-start for local services
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged 20+ PRs including widget CLI, audit mode, compliance webhooks, and Redis leader election for Slack
monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed token leakage in credential resolution, Shopify reinstall issues, and claim automation payload bugs
agent-factory (wolzey): Added deeper Claude integrations featuring error explosions, commit confetti, PR celebrations, cost coins, and diff heatmaps
agent-factory (wolzey): Fixed zombie session resurrection on resume and stopped reaping active sessions in Claude registry
agent-factory (wolzey): Resolved qrterminal/v3 dependency and cabinet alpha animation issues with upstream conflict resolution

summaries.summary: Shipped 88 commits across 4 TypeScript repos this week. Delivered major UI redesigns and feature expansions in agent-factory (chat panel, vortex command, spawn animations) and monolog (widget customizer, theme branding, MCP tools). Fixed critical cart-widget persistence and layout issues.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented theme branding API with merchant fonts, Shopify CLI temp file handling, and 13+ new MCP tools for communications and diagnostics
agent-factory: Redesigned chat UI with unified panel, syntax highlighting, command suggestions dropdown, and /vortex command with epic 15s animation effect
agent-factory: Fixed zombie slot shifting, subagent resurrection logic, tombstone reservation system, and added randomized spawn animations for new agents
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Fixed settings merge logic preventing data loss, empty bullet point filtering, modal alignment, and non-blocking preference persistence
op-theme-cli (OrderProtection): Converted to TypeScript, integrated Claude Code CLI for automated theme analysis, and refactored to use temp directories instead of permanent storage
monolog (OrderProtection): Added extended warranty line items to payment section, env drift detection tooling, and hard security scoping for store-bound channels
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced widget customizer with missing CE checkout settings and improved valet preview with backgroundColor and hideLogo support

summaries.summary: Shipped extended warranty features and info modal enhancements across OrderProtection/monolog and cart-widget (TypeScript). Merged 14 commits adding AB test support, copyright toggles, and claim link customization. Fixed persistence issues and improved state management.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Added extended warranty support to AB test UI with improved store change handling and EW price settings
monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented show/hide copyright toggle and file a claim link customization in info modal
monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed disclaimer text persistence in widget config and resolved EW fetch staleness on store changes
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Added customizable file a claim link feature with default to claim.orderprotection.com
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced MCP client with session reconnect logic and added observability tools to internal MCP
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Reviewed and merged warranty pricing hierarchy fixes and UK IP block removal
monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed warranty tag updates not firing on status changes across merchant and Shopify services
documentation (OrderProtection): Updated pixel documentation with configuration improvements

summaries.summary: Shipped 15 commits across OrderProtection/monolog and personal portfolio. Fixed critical valet widget issues, cache invalidation, and warranty tag propagation. Advanced feature work on dynamic strings and variant rounding across monolog and cart-widget.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed valet info modal navigation, settings page UX, and restored checkout widget preview with proper border styling
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged warranty tag cascade fixes for variant syncing and parent product ID emissions via Kafka

monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped claim automation insights, training features, and engineering permission access controls
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Advanced feature PRs for dynamic string user preferences and configurable variant rounding
pidoshva.github.io: Fixed date handling in weekly summary backfill and journal metadata formatting for ISO timestamps
monolog (OrderProtection): Merged headless mode support for dev TUI with ANSI stripping for AI agent compatibility

monolog (OrderProtection): Resolved merge conflicts in widget service/controller and removed any types for improved type safety
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced developer tooling with headless mode, ANSI stripping for AI agents, and MCP servers documentation

summaries.summary: Shipped 59 commits across 5 repos, primarily fixing warranty validity calculations and dynamic string preferences in OrderProtection/monolog (TypeScript). Advanced eyegaze eye-tracking features and enhanced gifify logging. Updated portfolio with automated weekly summary logic.
highlights: monolog (OrderProtection): Fixed validity mismatch in duration calculations, resolved merge conflicts, and ensured global info modal consistency across Cart Widget and Checkout Experience
monolog (OrderProtection): Implemented dynamic string user preferences and configurable variant rounding for widget settings across multiple services
monolog (OrderProtection): Enhanced warranty tagging pipeline with OP:OtaEligible, OP:IncludeWarranty tags and cascading warranty status to variants
monolog (OrderProtection): Shipped claim automation insights, training features, and improved agent decision tracking with enhanced logging
cart-widget (OrderProtection): Merged customizable info modal content, warranty exclusion support, and automatic pickup detection features
eyegaze: Initial implementation of macOS eye-tracking cursor control with improved calibration density and cursor stability
gifify: Released production-ready version with enhanced colored logging, spinner, progress bar, and resolved merge conflicts
pidoshva.github.io: Updated portfolio with refined weekly summary logic and added operational email to GitHub user emails
